description: Visual state indicator. Variant drives color + animation. Pairs with status-message (textual) and notification-wc (action-bearing).

attributes.name: data-variant
attributes.description: Built-in: live, recording, streaming, error, online, running, away, paused, busy, offline, stopped. Custom variants supported via CSS only.

attributes.name: data-size
attributes.description: xs | sm | md (default) | lg — dot diameter scale

attributes.name: data-position
attributes.description: before (default) | after | only — dot position relative to label; "only" visually hides label

attributes.name: data-pulse
attributes.description: on | off — override the variant's default animation

attributes.name: data-live
attributes.description: Set to "off" to suppress live-region announcements (decorative use)

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Required when slot has no text content

events.name: status-wc:change
events.description: Fires when data-variant mutates. detail: { variant, previousVariant }
